        children: "import type {BinaryFeatureCollection} from '@loaders.gl/schema';\n\nconst data: BinaryFeatureCollection = {\n  shape: 'binary-feature-collection',\n  // points,\n  // lines,\n  // polygons\n};\n"

    }), "\n", _jsx(_components.pre, {
      children: _jsx(_components.code, {
        className: "language-ts",
        children: "import type {BinaryPointFeature} from '@loaders.gl/schema';\n\ndata.points = {\n  type: 'Point',\n  positions: {value: new Float32Array([x0, y0, x1, y1, x2, y2, ...]), size: 2}, // Use size=2 for xy and size=3 for xyz\n  // featureIds\n  // globalFeatureIds\n  // numericProps\n  // properties\n} as BinaryPointFeature\n"

    }), "\n", _jsx(_components.pre, {
      children: _jsx(_components.code, {

        children: "import type {BinaryLineFeature} from '@loaders.gl/schema';\n\ndata.lines = {\n  type: 'LineString',\n  positions: {value: new Float32Array([x0, y0, x1, y1, x2, y2, ...]), size: 2}, // Use size=2 for xy and size=3 for xyz\n  pathIndices: {value: new Uint16Array([0, 5, 7, ...]), size: 1}, // First line contains vertex 0-4, second line contains vertex 5-6, ...\n  // featureIds\n  // globalFeatureIds\n  // numericProps\n  // properties\n} as BinaryLineFeature\n"
